lastReleaseMessage: correct the inverted print-path hazard in the handler to match the shipped print-stage render; rewrite the v1.0.0/v1.0.1 changelog stubs as milestone notes; reverify the print render on the live build

barRaise.topFinding: v1.0.2 closed every open finding from the 2026-06-24 bar-raise, and the closures verify against the code, not just the commit message. The inverted CLAUDE.md print hazard now correctly describes the parallel #print-stage tree and the body > * sweep that styles/label.css ships; the v1.0.0/v1.0.1 CHANGELOG entries are rewritten as human milestone notes; and the print render was reverified on the live build, closing the ~31-day print-test gap. The 2026-06-25 canonical audit reads no drift and all three version pills agree at v1.0.2. One cosmetic LOW remains: the v1.0.2 CHANGELOG entry is itself a stub (its bullet repeats the heading) even though that commit rewrote the earlier stubs. Feature-complete, parked at a clean stopping point, on weekly constellation-only cadence.
